emails.subject: can you send info
emails.body: can you send info JEff--I was just on the phone with Kaufman and he asked if you could send me a great document that you put together on a demand buy down program (and he said it was the one you put together for Hertberg). Could you send either via e mail or fax? 612-339-4392
